problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
